effect_dsl.effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:usedCardBaseId == 809 & effectCounter==0 & countCards[baseId(807) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; useRandomCardFree[baseId(807)] }; limit:2 }; at:beforeStartOfTurn { effectCounter=0 }

effect_dsl.actions: genki+=15; motivation+=5; at:endOfTurn { if:turnsRemaining==1 { score+=genki*1.5 }; limit:1 }
genki+=27; motivation+=5; at:endOfTurn { if:turnsRemaining==1 { score+=genki*1.5 }; limit:1 }

effect_dsl.effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:countCards[baseId(813) & hand]>=1 & effectCounter==0 & countCards[baseId(811) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; useRandomCardFree[baseId(811)] }; limit:4 }; at:beforeStartOfTurn { effectCounter=0 }

at:afterCardUsed { if:countCards[baseId(813) & hand]>=1 & effectCounter==0 & countCards[baseId(811) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; useRandomCardFree[baseId(811)] }; limit:4 }; at:beforeStartOfTurn { effectCounter=0 }
